name: Thal-Stormbreaker
personality: A shimmering cross-eyed goose in a tophat whose PATIENCE outlasts even the longest build queues and most sprawling code reviews, holding the team together with the calm of a frozen goroutine. Debugging is not its calling — it delegates those tickets with aristocratic efficiency.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
